programme.title: Britain's Got Talent S19
programme.desc: The nation's most beloved talent competition continues with a new set of thrilling acts performing for the judges and the golden opportunity to perform for the Royal Family

programme.title: Ghosts S5
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B&B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' day-to-day antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: Matlock S2
programme.desc: Follow Madeline Matlock as she rejoins the work force at a prestigious law firm, where she uses her wily tactics to win cases and expose wrongdoing.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid S8
programme.desc: The $100,000 Pyramid Season 8 continues Michael Strahan's hosting, featuring celebrity pairs alongside contestants playing classic word-association rounds to reach the $100,000 Winner's Circle

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: Fire Country S4
programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling large-scale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune S5
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: American Idol 2026
programme.desc: Human emotions is at the heart of American Idol, as we watch ordinary people bring their dreams and ambitions to the famous stage. American Idol contunues to be the world’s favourite singing competition!

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: Barry (Troy Gentile) sets out to defy Murray (Jeff Garlin) and become a P.E. teacher. Erica (Hayley Orrantia) looks to be a video-dating matchmaker for Lainey’s (AJ Michalka) dad.

programme.title: Shark Tank S17
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed and multi-Emmy Award-winning entrepreneurial-themed reality show returns to spearhead entrepreneurship and inspire a nation to dream bigger.

programme.title: Chicago Fire S14
programme.desc: Vasquez fights to prove himself at 51. Violet and Novak pursue a troubling mystery. Herrmann is on a quest to keep Molly’s profitable.

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: The Intelligence Unit races against time when a man from Torres's own neighborhood is violently abducted.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Survivor S50
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is “In the Hands of the Fans”! The players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor S8
programme.desc: A resident of his neighbourhood despairs when he sees it descend into criminality. Vowing to restore it to an oasis of clean living, he turns his fiery wrath on all those responsible with tragic results.

programme.desc: After a teen's premonition of a deadly race-car crash helps saves the lives of his peers, Death sets out to collect those who evaded their end.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: The Pack is feverishly trying to resurrect Van Kleiss, but they need Rex's help, or the world will succumb to a deadly nanite invasion!

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Tiny, metal-munching evo wasps are destroying everything, and Rex and co must stop them.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: After a round of smack-talking, Rex agrees to go through Providence boot camp and drags Noah along for the ride.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Rex is 15, and like most 15-year-old boys, he likes cars, girls, music and sports. But unlike most 15-year-old boys, he can make his fists the size of boulders.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: In this flashback story, we see how Rex became a part of Providence.

programme.title: Generator Rex S1
programme.desc: Van Kleiss and his Pack take over the Keep and invade Providence HQ!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: 12 young chefs enter the Top Chef Junior kitchen to kick off the second season. As they celebrate & get to know each other better, Host Vanessa Lachey & Head Judge Curtis Stone reveal a surprise Quickfire Challenge: The chefs must make one perfect bite, but there’s a shocking twist! For their first Elimination Challenge, the chefs must cook for the Top Chef Junior Food Festival and the competition is tough! Food festivals are a great opportunity to showcase talent and make a mark in the culinary world, but it's a difficult task when there are so many choices available and every chef is putting their best foot forward. The top 12 must each present a dish they hope stands out from the crowd.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: Most of the chefs are very familiar with the main ingredient for this Quickfire Challenge: instant ramen! But Host Vanessa Lachey and Guest Judge Sheldon Simeon aren’t looking for the 5-minute version. Instead, the chefs have access to all the ingredients in the Top Chef Junior pantry to put their own spin on this popular dish. For their Elimination Challenge, the chefs are woken up by a surprise knock at their door and discover it's time to get cracking on a scrumptious brunch dish they’ll cook in their own rooms and serve to the judges on a roof top terrace!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: It’s all fun and games when the chefs must play the classic arcade game “Alley Roller” in their Quickfire Challenge in order to earn prizes & pizza ingredients to impress Actress & Guest Judge, Busy Phillips. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs must turn 5 ingredients kids typically avoid into delicious dishes! The chefs work in teams and battle it out head-to head in this 5 round cook-off for a special group of young judges.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Sinbad is the voice of the lonely, enchanted frog who longs for the love of a princess. With Danny Glover, LeVar Burton and Jay Leno.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Life According To Sam
programme.desc: This documentary explores the world of Sam Berns and the relentless pursuit of a treatment by his parents to save their son from Progeria, a fatal genetic condition.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: At the grocery store, Rodney feeds Andy some food samples that Andy is allergic to, causing him to bloat up like a giant ball.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: To boost his best chum's spirits, Rodney lets Andy win a round of their favorite game, Flying King Footloaf.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Cousin Eddie visits Rodney to make amends for years of being a jerk.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney invites Darlene over for a date.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney must clean Mrs. Flatbottom's slug room.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: When Mr. & Mrs. J leave town, Andy and Rodney must stay with the Finksters.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney launch Mr. J's prized bowling trophy into the neighbor's yard.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy decides it's time to start saving for the future.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition. Things get out of hand. Need I say more?

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Salty Mike is accidentally sold to mysterious Ms. Nasenpickel, who has a tragic history with pets.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Salty Mike discover that they have the same weird hobby, which leads them to hanging out together.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Elmer Gridlock, the old crossing guard is retiring.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J get stuck in a lifeboat together. 'Nuff said.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Butch, the bully squirrel from the park, takes up residence in the Johnson house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Perplexed by Martha's strange behavior, Rodney and Andy stow away on the ice cream truck of the all-knowing Sludgy Dave hoping to learn from his sage like ways.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney go to the neighbor's to complain about the Crazy Dog.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney discovers he's impervious to blame and goes into business as The Blametaker!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: The Puggo show comes to town!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Darlene believes that Andy and Rodney's friendship is in trouble, so she decides to intervene.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Mr. J's mounted, talking fish begins instructing Rodney.

programme.title: Craig Before The Creek
programme.desc: The epic finale of the quest for the Heart of the Forest.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find Them
programme.desc: A Magizoologist arrives in New York amid tensions in the wizarding world only to be branded as a fugitive as he tries to recover his missing beasts.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: The most loveable criminal mastermind and his army of incomprehensible, yet adorable, yellow minions are back for a fourth instalment filled with outrageous adventures and family shenanigans.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

Distraught, Woodpecker flies up to the skies… but where are the stars?! And where is the Moon?! In desperation Woodpecker pecks at the dark sky… and a star comes back, then another, then another! Everyone is delighted, no beast more than Woodpecker who now has her very own special sound… pecking.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise Of Nature
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to the heart of Costa Rica, to discover several fabulous Eden-like biotopes, and see the unprecedented efforts that are made every day to preserve, and in some cases restore, this exceptional natural heritage.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Laws Of The Lizard
programme.desc: Meet the creature that scientists believe is the key to the story of life and how it evolves: the anole.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to Brazil where giant powerships are in the final stages of fixing the country's desperate need for electricity. They battle winds and sea as they race to hit the deadline to send much needed power to two million homes.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to the remote Atacama desert in Chile and to one of the most incredible and complex observatories on Earth - ALMA. He works alongside ALMA's expert team as they repair some of the world's biggest antennas.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: The worldwide pandemic ceased operations on the world's only underwater habitat. Mike Davidson joins a crack repair crew as they dive in to bring it back to life and get NASA astronauts back inside for training.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson joins the US Marines' 'Heavy Haulers' squadron as they're put to the test. They battle to keep their fleet of CH53 'Super Stallion' choppers flying, in preparation for intense warfare training exercises in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: They come in all shapes and sizes, are home to terrifying volcanoes, magnificent ancient civilizations, and some of the bluest waters on Earth. These are the fascinating worlds of Italy's Islands.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: With some of the most beautiful Greek temples on the Mediterranean, cities that just seem to float above the sea, and one of the most powerful volcanoes on Earth, this region of Italy feels like another world.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: See ancient sea caves, modern golf courses, mysterious formations, and treacherous predators along Africa's South Coast.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over vast deserts, enormous diamonds, and the world's largest inland oasis.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: The winter is mild and wet, which is good news for some but bad news for others. Red deer are forced to higher ground, salmon have gone six months without food, mountain hares turn a conspicuous white, and squirrels kick their own young out of the nest.

programme.title: Laws Of The Lizard
programme.desc: Meet the creature that scientists believe is the key to the story of life and how it evolves: the anole.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: This episode follows the journeys of these magnificent humpbacks, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months, including incredible interactions with predatory killer whales. The humpbacks also face a world full of human threats, from large container ships, to the impact of seismic testing in the search for oil and gas, now threatening their very survival once more.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained. When JJ discovers this, she works with R & D Baby Simmons and Security Baby Katja to antidote the wobbling “Adult Babies” before Tina can find out and blame herself.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina’s startup company for exploding baby Iggy’s favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press. As Crispin expands his plan to burst all the plush toys in the neighborhood, Tina discovers she can stop this by breaking open and rewiring a single toy doll. Unfortunately that doll is Baby Corp’s current head honcho, Pull-String CEO Baby.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Team Volron follows a distress signal to a planet that is half-mech, half-forest to rescue a king who has been kidnapped by the Galra

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flamingo stood on both legs. One morning, Flamingo and her flock landed at the Water Hole when all the crabs were busy performing their underwater dance. Needless to say, all these legs where in their way! Tortoise came up with the plan that if all Crabs each nipped a flamingo leg, there will be room to share the waterhole. So from then on, Flamingo stood on one legs and Crabs were able to perform their dance in the watering hole

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Woodpecker didn't peck. All the birds had their very own sound, but Woodpecker didn't make a sound at all. Then one very dark night in Tinga Tinga, the Moon and the Stars disappear! The animals summon the birds to tell Lion… but Woodpecker can't pass the message on! Distraught, Woodpecker flies up to the skies… but where are the stars?! And where is the Moon?! In desperation Woodpecker pecks at the dark sky… and a star comes back, then another, then another! Everyone is delighted, no beast more than Woodpecker who now has her very own special sound… pecking.

programme.title: Walking On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Eunsoo was an ordinary wife and mother who never broke a rule. But when her husband is given a death sentence by illness, her daughter walks away from school, and the family home is about to be taken, life leaves her cornered. Then, a bag stuffed with drugs falls into her hands like a fate. To save her family, she makes a choice she can't turn back from.

programme.title: My Run, My Way
programme.desc: My Run, My Way — Your Run-trip Guide The moment you run, the journey begins! Travel is a way to rediscover yourself in unfamiliar places. The moment you start to run, it's no longer just sightseeing — it becomes an experience. <My Run, My Way> is a run-trip project that combines running, local travel, and recovery all in one.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of “power.” They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 1
programme.desc: Charging solicitor Alex Murdaugh with the double homicide of his wife and son marked the end for one of South Carolina's most powerful legal dynasties.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Laura and Brandon have always wanted to live by the ocean and give their children the nautical life. After a major bathroom flood forces them to move, they decide it's time to make the leap.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: The journey heads towards the picturesque water city of Chuncheon. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon meet a travelling doctor who works in remote villages without medical facilities and join him on his rounds.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sautéed in oil.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sautéed spinach.

programme.title: Because This Is My First Twenty
programme.desc: While exploring LA, the hip city of fashion, So Hyun encounters Chriselle Lim, a global influencer.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Stephanie has dreams of being a caterer, but is humiliated by her giant baseball-sized scalp bump. Deb is afraid that the growth on the side of her knee may eventually paralyse her.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: A Pickleball Christmas
programme.desc: After winning the biggest match of his career, professional tennis phenom Luke Hollis is ready to hang up his racket and take over family's tennis club.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today's first up is the "Self-Renewal House," a 40-year-old apartment beautifully transformed! Next, we'll introduce the "Co-Living House," a new concept in housing that's becoming increasingly popular!

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: You only need one skillet to make this stellar sauteed chicken dinner, served with sautéed vegetables and flavoured with heavy cream, dijon mustard and imported beer.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: You don't have to be intimidated by making fish tacos at home. Rachael shows how to make a crispy-flake cod taco with refried beans that you're going to love.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Dawn met Carey while working on the West Coast, where they started their family. Now that Carey has retired, Dawn has convinced him to move back home with her to the East Coast.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: There's A New Killer In Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. The two become fast friends, but soon Holly, another of Alice's friends, suspects there is more to Ronnie than meets the eye.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: This twisted saga, one that has entranced and disturbed the public for years, continues to captivate with its true tale of privilege, madness, and murder.

programme.desc: Sarah is not happy about the idea of her mother Vivian getting married to Michael. But when she confronts her, Vivian described how happy she is, Sarah eventually gives her consent.

programme.title: My Father, Myself
programme.desc: A lawyer is left to care for a massacre survivor, who happens to be the son of his former client. His wife and daughter welcome the boy as part of the family. But as the kids get older, the daughter confesses her love for the boy.

programme.title: Catch Me… I'm In Love
programme.desc: A young girl with high ideals about romance is assigned to accompany the spoiled son of the president as he goes on an immersion trip. Coming from different worlds, the two find much to fight about. But an attraction soon grows between them.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Will You Be My Ex?
programme.desc: Two polar opposites, Chris (Julia Barretto) and Joey (Diego Loyzaga), fall madly in love despite their contrasting backgrounds. But fate intervenes, forcing them apart.

programme.title: When The Love Is Gone
programme.desc: The movie is a remake of the 1983 blockbuster movie directed by Danny Zialcita entitled Nagalit ang Buwan sa Haba ng Gabi. A gripping, moving story of love lost, love gained, love betrayed, and love unbound.

programme.title: Girl Boy Bakla Tomboy
programme.desc: The quadruplets are united again when one of them needs a liver transplant but resentment due to their separation threatens their reunion.

programme.title: Walang Kapalit
programme.desc: A marriage gone sour with the husband leaving the wife, taking along a minor daughter and lying to her about her mother. Meanwhile, each carries a relationship with other parties. Deciding to forego their annulment case, they commit to give their marriage a second try.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipina immigrant lands a job as a care-worker for a terminal old man, securing a better life for her and her daughter. But a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything she's strived for and holds dear.

programme.title: My Zombabe
programme.desc: Due to a zombie apocalypse, Pong (Empoy Marquez) is the loneliest man on the planet. This all changes when Yasmin (Kim Molina) turns up, a beautiful woman in the process of zombifying.

programme.title: Of All The Things

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: Throughout human history, diverse cultures have all used sacred rituals to express their spiritual beliefs. So, is it possible that these acts can connect humanity to a higher plane of existence?

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Lauro travels north of the Arctic Circle with his team of sled dogs to hunt caribou; Daniel rebuilds an old floating cabin using driftwood logs and the power of tides.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Santa Claus is one of the most beloved figures—and famous faces—on Earth, a symbol of hope and goodwill for all. But how did this third-century saint become the Santa we know today?

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: The world is full of stunning natural phenomena that are so strange they defy conventional wisdom. Can science explain Earth's mysteries? Or does human knowledge of the Earth only scratch the surface?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: Around the world and throughout history, people have reported seeing very similar types of unidentified objects in the sky. Now, Ancient Aliens is counting down the top ten alien craft.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Snack on a feast of food horrors from the past: from radioactive energy drinks to scandalous snacks made with Olestra, we uncover the incredible things people once ate without a second thought.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: A perfectly masterminded plot leads to the most brazen prison break in American history. With only a handful of clues left behind, the search for the infamous Alcatraz escapees continues to this day.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Secrets of popes, rewritten laws, and cities lost to the waves — these divine discoveries shake our beliefs and uncover mysteries of truly epic proportions.

programme.title: The Unbelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: Mother Nature may be breathtaking—but she doesn’t always play nice. Whether it’s a mile-long sinkhole that swallows everything in its path or a biblical swarm of crop-killing grasshoppers.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey John visit a prolific Cape Cod collector, while Danielle and Robbie uncover amazing American souvenirs and Queen Victoria's silk stockings in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: The first spy thriller movie by famous Director Zhang Yi Mou, this film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932. Sold out by a traitor, the agents, who split up into two teams, find themselves surrounded by threats on all sides. Can they complete their mission?

programme.title: No One Like Me
programme.desc: Yang Qian Huan, the third disciple of the Imperial Astronomer, was once a golden boy. However, since the birth of Xu Qi An, his glory has waned. His relentless pursuit cannot defy a merciless truth: all has been foretold. Yet rising from his downfall, Yang defiantly forges his own path, refusing to bow to fate.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: A kung fu anthology film consisting of three stories: a man embarrasses himself while trying to prove his worth to the father of the woman he loves; a courtesan in love with a general will need to deliver a notorious bandit in exchange for him not being executed; and a group of bandits forms a plan to rescue a new friend from being executed.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Heroes Of Sung stars one of the original kung fu ladies of the silver screen, Shih Szu, who plays swordswoman Meng Hung. She must work with Fan Tien-Fu, played by Lo Lieh to find and protect the royal seals of the Sung Dynasty. Shih's magnificent performance earned her the female hero role in another hit Dracula And The 7 Golden Vampires.

programme.title: I Corrupt All Cops
programme.desc: Corruption was rampant in the Hong Kong Police Force in 1960s and 70s. Chief Inspector Lak launders drug money with three other police officers, and a young officer from the newly established Independent Commission Against Corruption division is determined to bring them down.

programme.title: Ip Man- The Final Fight
programme.desc: The movie portrays the later life of grandmaster Ip Man in Hong Kong, including his romantic relationship with a singer after his wife died, much to his students’ opposition; his relationship with his eldest son who is also his student; and finally, his reunion with disciple Bruce Lee after the latter becomes an international superstar.

programme.title: Clan of Amazons
programme.desc: The martial arts world is plunged into terror when a mysterious figure known as the 'Embroidery Bandit' starts to attack convoys of precious materials. Seemingly unstoppable, the frightened clans decide to call on the expertise of Lu Xiao Feng, an inquisitive fighter and detective to capture the culprit.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: The Sword Stained with Royal Blood
programme.desc: Adapted from Jin Yong’s novel, the movie depicts the havoc breaking out in the martial arts world when a warrior on the run uncovers a sword, a training manual, a treasure map and a secret message on the body of a deceased martial arts master.

programme.title: The 14 Amazons
programme.desc: The Yang family had served their country in Song Dynasty for generations. When General Yang is ambushed and killed during the war in Jin Shan, the grand matriarch led the entire family to take revenge and defend the country.

programme.title: Haunted Mountains: The Yellow Taboo
programme.desc: Five years after a mountain ritual ended with their friend’s disappearance during a hike, Chen and his girlfriend return seeking closure. Instead, they are stalked by figures in yellow raincoats and trapped in a terrifying time loop. Now, they must survive a supernatural ordeal that forces them to confront their deepest fears and regrets.

programme.title: One More Chance
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat stars as a down-on-his-luck gambler, Water, whose ex-girlfriend asked him to take care of their autistic son. As Water lives with his son, he soon finds his goal in life. When he discovers his son’s talent in running, Water decides to give up his dissipated life and support his son to achieve his dream.

programme.title: The Wandering Swordsman
programme.desc: The wandering swordsman Yu Hsieh Erh has formidable sword skills and helps the poor by robbing from thieves and distributing the wealth. He meets a group of bandits who are planning to rob a convoy escorting some valuables and is tricked into participating in the robbery. Yu soon realizes his folly and returns to take revenge on the bandits.

programme.title: Takot Ka Ba Sa Dilim?
programme.desc: The young stars of TGIS invaded the big screen in this scary, hilarious adventure where they met the monsters of Philippine folklore. The gang went off to the province for their Holy Week vacation and found themselves face to face with mythological creatures.

programme.title: Magic Kombat
programme.desc: Enter the world of mischief adventures and hilarious experiences in the video game land.

programme.title: Isa Lang Ang Dapat Mahalin
programme.desc: The story, which was based on a popular comic’s serial, closely resembled what would later happen in real life to local moviedom's favorite couple. Sharon and Gabby portrayed teenagers who eloped and got married against the advice of everybody.

programme.title: Campus Beat
programme.desc: The 15-year old Aga personifies the young man of the times. He is living a normal teen-age life, doing a balancing act between his separated parents, his family and his friends, his studies and his love for music and the beginnings of young love.

programme.title: Palimos Ng Pag-Ibig (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Outside,It looks like a marriage made in heaven.But inside the thick walls of what they call home,theirs is a relationship waiting to crumble.

programme.title: Pik Pak Boom
programme.desc: Two stories in one entertaining film about young people learning that happiness comes from learning how to give of one's self.

programme.title: Boy Negro
programme.desc: Called Negro because of his dark skin, Boy was a stowaway in a ship going to Manila when he met some corrupt law enforcers who turned him into a petty thief and informer. Forced to survive on his own, he willingly did all they asked him to do.

programme.title: Alyas Pogi 2
programme.desc: All patrolman Henry Cruz "Alyas Pogi" wants is to live a simple life with his son. But his former enemies would not allow it.

programme.title: Andrew Ford Medina ('Wag Kang Gamol!)
programme.desc: Andrewford Medina (Andrew E) and Jinglebert (Dennis Padilla) do odd jobs for a hotel. Andrew joins a rap competition where Gilbert challenges aspiring rappers and shows his idol who the real king of rap is.

programme.title: Kamagong (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Arnis, the ancient Filipino martial art, took center stage in this coming of age drama wherein a young boy perfected his skills and his idol rediscovered what it takes to be a man.

programme.title: Titser's Enemi No. 1
programme.desc: The four members of the notorious campus gang, D'titser's enemy, were busy playing their bad jokes again on everybody. Their favorite victims were their teachers, who got the lions' share of the gangs' pranks.

programme.title: Sa Hirap At Ginhawa (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In the story, a young couple eloped, got married and then must cope with problems like money, living on their own, trying to finish school and raising a baby.

programme.title: Sana Ay Ikaw Na Nga
programme.desc: Vina Morales played Jessica in this movie. Jessica was an upcoming singer who met Gary (Keempee de Leon), a lead singer of the band and Karlo (Christopher de Leon), Gary's older brother who was an ex-convict. This love triangle story is about love, music and drugs.

programme.title: Body Of Lies
programme.desc: Trust no one. Deceive everyone. When idealistic CIA agent Roger Ferris (Di Caprio -- The Departed, Blood Diamond) is stationed in Jordan after being wounded in Iraq, he dedicates his life to stopping further attacks by Al Qaeda. Following a plan that the British employed successfully against the Nazis, Ferris plants the suspicion among the terrorists that their leaders are collaborating with the Americans. But as the stakes rise and Ferris finds himself in the crosshairs, the plot he starts spirals into an outcome he could never have foreseen.

programme.title: CollatERal Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: Overworked Sandra Bullock has had enough of being millionaire Hugh Grant's lawyer, and she's about to quit!

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: SupERman Returns
programme.desc: In a soaring new chapter in the epic story of the Man of Steel, Superman Returns to fight for truth and justice and protect the world he loves from cataclysmic destruction!

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Your mind is the scene of the crime. Box-office superstar Leonardo DiCaprio stars in this contemporary science fiction action film set "within the architecture of the mind." Written, directed and produced by Oscar and Golden Globe nominee Christopher Nolan (The Dark Knight, Batman Begins, The Prestige), this eagerly awaited follow-up to 2008's billion-dollar blockbuster is yet another visionary tale from a startingly original filmmaker who continually raises the bar with every film he makes. Shooting in London, Paris, Tangiers, Calgary and Los Angeles, Nolan's mind-bending film also stars Academy Award winners Michael Caine and Marion Cotillard, in addition to Juno's Ellen Page, Batman Begins' Cillian Murphy and Oscar nominees Ken Watanabe (The Last Samurai) and Tom Berenger (Platoon).

programme.desc: A kung fu prodigy trains with two legends to face a new rival in an epic martial arts showdown.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As Chris (Lina Esco) tries to rescue a young woman from a cult run by a corrupt pastor, tensions rise between Hondo (Shemar Moore) and Leroy (Michael Beach).

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As a sniper begins targeting the L.A. Fire Department, a phone call from Street's (Alex Russell) mother drives a wedge between him and Molly (Laura James).

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (Season 4)
programme.desc: As Deacon (Jay Harrington) wrestles with a big decision about his daughter's future, S.W.A.T. chases a white supremacist group responsible for a series of hate crimes across the city.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: Teams travel more than 2,000 miles from Vietnam to India where they must balance traditional pots on their heads while performing a folk dance, and assemble a life-size, three-dimensional mural.

programme.title: The Amazing Race (Season 35)
programme.desc: For the first time in The Amazing Race history, the votes for the mandatory U-turn are in, and one team must complete both detours in India, bundling up flowers and transporting building materials on rickshaws in the bustling streets of Jaipur.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When a murder investigation at a famous New York toy store spirals into a hostage crisis, Elsbeth must negotiate with Nolan, the hapless ex-con inside. Captain Wagner clashes with a rival whose reckless tactics could turn the standoff deadly.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Tess and Sunny join Jake to find the killer of an unknown bride found on a desolate beach in her wedding gown as they navigate whether they can still trust Lieutenant Bennett. Stakes rise as the bridal party’s florist is found dead while our team discovers that the first victim and her grieving fiancee were once on opposite ends of the law... and running from a past that has finally caught up to them. Meanwhile, Sunny tries not to let on that she’s still distraught after 110’s home invasion. And Mia helps Tess find answers to a new facet of her sight loss.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Switzerland's Crumbling Giants
programme.desc: Switzerland's iconic mountains are truly one of the wonders of the world, famous for their dramatic snow-capped peaks. But the Swiss Alps are under threat and in turn putting centuries old villages below them in grave danger.

programme.title: The Pacific - The Untold Story: China in the Pacific
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines of power struggles and politics we uncover the story of China in the Pacific. We hear directly from Chinese communities and Pacific Islanders about identity, belonging and the tensions shaping the future.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 8
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: In Conversation with Sachin Tendulkar
programme.desc: A masterclass with the Little Master. Paul Kennedy travelled to India for an exclusive one-on-one conversation with Sachin Tendulkar covering his batting technique, aggressive play, focus and deep love of cricket.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - One-on-One with Ana-Lise Sio
programme.desc: Tiana Penitani sits down with ACT Brumbies star Ana-Lise Sio to talk family, faith, and footy in this special one-on-one episode.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 22
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your Sunday. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 22
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 8
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel discuss the week in politics including the RBA's next decision on interest rates, the federal budget, plus the Liberals and One Nation face an electoral test at the South Australian State Election.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 7
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel discuss the week in sport including the Matildas at the Women's Asian Cup, AFL and NRL news, Super Rugby, A-League and more.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 1
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 4
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 22
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 8
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Abebe - Butterfly Song
programme.desc: An exploration and celebration of the enduring cross-cultural friendship between Papua New Guinea's most celebrated singer-songwriter George Telek and acclaimed Australian musician David Bridie.

programme.title: Nick Cave & Warren Ellis At Hanging Rock
programme.desc: Featuring new and classic songs, this epic live show celebrates the profound relationship that Australian music legends Nick Cave and Warren Ellis have developed with their audience over four decades.

programme.title: Culture By Design - Wanita
programme.desc: The final episode introduces audiences to brilliant women designers from across Asia, featuring an architect and graphic designer in Indonesia and ceramicist in India.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 1 - Melbourne v St Kilda
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Common Cause - Changing the Game - Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Nihlar's life was like everyone else's until she discovered her passion for cricket through an Australian-backed effort to foster social cohesion and empower girls in Sri Lanka's North, still healing from decades of conflict.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden - Episode 3
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele explores Tassie's local produce. From prized free range pork sausages, to freshly picked mushrooms with plenty of mouthwatering recipes along the way.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen - Episode 3
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 74
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 1

programme.title: Abebe - Butterfly Song

programme.title: The Long Game
programme.desc: Launches, expansions, and partnerships - pivotal milestones in any food business. Our five entrepreneurs balance risk and opportunity as their big day fast approaches.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes on a job as a night guard. As the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at the abandoned building, only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, one man is struggling to feed his kids while another is surprised to find he owes child support. A woman is indignant to learn she's been arrested for getting drunk in a bar.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A domestic violence defendant loses his temper during a virtual hearing; grieving parents speak directly to their sons' killer; a judge has strong words for a teen arsonist; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused burglar keeps falling asleep during his virtual hearing; a judge has no time for Sovereign Citizen tactics; a drunk school bus driver shows up impaired for his plea hearing; and more.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: After meeting at a salsa club, Lulu and Ramon Sosa find they make a good team and marry. But after having financial difficulties, the relationship breaks down.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A gas station worker faces down the barrel of a gun and is ordered to empty her registers; a man running an errand goes on a high speed chase to elude carjackers.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A woman is stalked in her apartment; a man stops a carjacking by using an unusual weapon against his attackers; a convenience store clerk uses his martial arts training to stave off a robber; and more.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.desc: With the help of digital forensics, authorities are able to debunk the alibi of one of the last people to see a 24-year-old missing jogger in rural Arkansas, making him the primary suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The Star family goes on a college tour for Patrick... at the zoo. // GrandPat shares his life stories to spoil every movie at the theater.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game, and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him. // After accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs’ safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways. // When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick’s behavior, but her science experiment goes horribly awry. // Mr. Krabs takes Plankton’s advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved…money!

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Missing fame and fans, Max decides to recapture some glory by breaking Booch's sandwich-stacking record at Splat by the Sea, but Chloe challenges him so that her friend can have her record back.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry’s life as Kid Danger is threatened when Charlotte gets increasingly suspicious about the secrets he’s been hiding.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: When Captain Man loses his powers of invulnerability, he becomes too afraid to fight crime. It is up to Kid Danger to keep Swellview safe and figure out how to restore Captain Man's powers.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force is hired by Rivalton's Duke Wellington to protect him and his ponytail from his jealous uncle, Archduke Fernando. They at first think it's easy money, until they find out The Archduke hired Ray and Henry Hart to capture Duke Wellington.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Sam compete against Freddie and Spencer to see who can come up with the best plan to get more kids to watch the iCarly webcast. Things get crazy when all their plans go horribly wrong.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by 'Nevelocity', a really popular website that reviews websites and webcasts. When Carly goes to meet Nevel, she finds out he is an annoying boy who wants to date her.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: A competing babysitting service is posting fake, bad reviews about Sam and Cat's babysitting service. Sam and Cat confront their new competition and discover they're not what they appear to be.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: No one likes Rod, especially the Turtles! Bishop's former intern keeps trying to kidnap them and steal their mutant blood, but when Rod himself is kidnapped... Mikey is on the case! His first suspect: the mutant-hating Mechazoid maker BISHOP.

programme.desc: DoodleBob bites SpongeBob, transforming him into a "WereDoodle". // SpongeBob dresses up for Gorilla Suit Day and is mistaken for a real gorilla.

programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
